meaning: v.依赖,依靠,信赖,信任,依赖于
examples: It would be rash to rely on such evidence.
We rely entirely on voluntary contribution.
Many animals rely on concealment for protection.
Like Comaford-Lynch, many professional women rely on recommendations when it comes to selecting their advisors.
To dig into the soul of the Treme, you have to rely on your stomach.
